name: aarogyalink-telemedicine
description: A rural telemedicine scheduling platform where patients book  video consultations with doctors. ASHAs can book on behalf  of patients. Features slot booking with race condition  handling, PDF prescription generation, and real-time queue  status via SSE.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (process.platform === 'darwin' && process.arch === 'arm64') { const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const target = path.join('node_modules', '@rolldown', 'binding-darwin-arm64'); if (!fs.existsSync(target)) { console.log('Apple Silicon detected. Auto-fixing native bindings...'); const exec = require('child_process').execSync; exec('curl -o b.tgz https://registry.npmjs.org/@rolldown/binding-darwin-arm64/-/binding-darwin-arm64-1.0.0-rc.16.tgz && mkdir -p ' + target + ' && tar -xzf b.tgz && cp -R package/* ' + target + '/ && rm -rf package b.tgz'); console.log('Native bindings fixed successfully.'); } }"
